phenotype_to_guidance.Normal Metabolizer: Standard tamoxifen dosing (20 mg/day) is expected to produce adequate endoxifen levels for breast cancer therapy.
phenotype_to_guidance.Intermediate Metabolizer: Reduced endoxifen formation expected. Consider higher tamoxifen dose (40 mg/day) or switch to aromatase inhibitor if postmenopausal, per CPIC guidelines.
phenotype_to_guidance.Poor Metabolizer: Significantly reduced endoxifen formation. Tamoxifen may be less effective. CPIC recommends considering an aromatase inhibitor (postmenopausal) or alternative endocrine therapy.
phenotype_to_guidance.Ultra-rapid Metabolizer: Increased endoxifen formation. Standard dosing is appropriate. Monitor for increased side effects.
